products.name: Grade 20 – General slabs
products.description: General purpose concrete for non-structural slabs

products.name: Grade 25 – Foundations
products.description: Standard concrete for house foundations and footings

products.name: Grade 30 – Structural beams/columns
products.description: Structural concrete for beams and columns

products.name: Grade 40 – High strength
products.description: High strength concrete for special applications

products.name: Pump truck – per trip
products.description: Pump truck for first floor or hard-to-reach areas

products.name: Concrete – Standard ready-mix
products.description: General purpose ready-mix concrete for typical slabs and small projects.

products.name: EcoBuild – Environment friendly mix
products.description: EcoBuild concrete designed for lower carbon footprint and consistent strength.

products.name: AquaBuild – Water-resistant mix
products.description: Concrete mix optimized for wet areas, tanks and retaining structures.

products.name: DecoBuild – Decorative concrete
products.description: Decorative concrete suitable for driveways, exposed finishes and visible areas.

products.name: FlowBuild Pro – High flow mix
products.description: High-flow, pump-friendly concrete for congested reinforcement and complex formwork.

products.name: SuperBuild – High performance mix
products.description: High performance structural concrete for demanding columns, cores and beams.

products.name: CoolBuild – Temperature controlled mix
products.description: Concrete engineered to reduce heat of hydration for mass pours and hot climates.

products.name: FlowBuild – Easy placing mix
products.description: Workable, easy-to-place concrete for slabs and beams with good finish.

products.name: FairBuild – Fair-faced concrete
products.description: Concrete formulated for fair-faced finishes with minimal surface defects.

products.name: RapidBuild – Fast setting mix
products.description: Fast setting concrete for time-critical repairs and early strength requirements.

products.name: FlexBuild – Flexible application mix
products.description: Versatile mix suitable for slabs, beams and general building applications.

products.name: FibreBuild – Fibre reinforced mix
products.description: Fibre reinforced concrete for crack control and enhanced durability.

products.name: Designated Concrete – Custom mix
products.description: Designated concrete mix where strength, slump and aggregate are specified by the engineer.

products.name: Castle – ECOCem product line
products.description: Castle is a mainstay of the ECOCem product line, made with lower CO₂ emissions for everyday building needs.
products.best_for: General structural work, columns, beams, slabs and foundations when mixing on site.

products.name: Wallcem – ECOCem wall plaster cement
products.description: Wallcem is an ECOCem range cement formulated to give better performance in plastering and finishing.
products.best_for: Internal and external wall plastering and rendering.

products.name: Phoenix – ECOCem product range
products.description: Phoenix is part of the ECOCem product range, engineered with lower CO₂ emissions and reliable strength.
products.best_for: General construction where an ECOCem Green Label product is required; direct alternative to Castle.

products.name: Walcrete – plastering cement
products.description: Walcrete is a specially designed plastering cement in the ECOCem product range.
products.best_for: Plastering applications on projects targeting green building certifications.

products.name: Top Standard – ECOCem product range
products.description: Top Standard is part of the ECOCem product range, designed for consistent performance and lower CO₂.
products.best_for: General construction where an eco-certified but cost-conscious cement is acceptable.

products.name: QuickRender-S1 – premixed mortar
products.description: QuickRender-S1 (387-S1) is a high quality, versatile premixed mortar for high bonding strength and efficient site work.

products.name: Thin-Joint Mortar – high performance premixed mortar
products.description: Thin-Joint Mortar (362) is a high performance premixed cementitious adhesive mortar with strong adhesive strength.

products.name: QuickPlast – polymer-modified plastering mortar
products.description: QuickPlast (399/397) is a polymer-modified plastering cement with better workability and water retention.

products.name: QuickRender+ – high performance premixed mortar
products.description: QuickRender+ (387+) is a high-performance polymer-modified premixed mortar for durable rendering applications.

products.name: Thin Plaster+ – polymer-modified thin plaster
products.description: Thin Plaster+ (386+) is a polymer-modified premixed mortar with excellent adhesion and semi-smooth finish.

products.name: DecoBuild – decorative concrete systems
products.description: DecoBuild is a collection of aesthetic concrete floor and pavement solutions for internal and external applications.

products.name: AquaBuild – pervious concrete pavement
products.description: AquaBuild is a pervious concrete pavement solution designed to direct stormwater off streets and pavements.
